description: You are a molecular evolutionary biologist preparing a human mitochondrial Cytochrome B (MT-CYB) sequence for cross-species alignment. Translate the raw DNA sequence located at ~/UGENE_Data/mitochondrial/human_mt_cyb.fasta into a single, continuous protein using the 'Vertebrate Mitochondrial' translation table. Save the annotated DNA sequence as a GenBank file to ~/UGENE_Data/results/mt_cyb_annotated.gb and export the translated amino acid sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/results/mt_cyb_protein.fasta. Create a summary report at ~/UGENE_Data/results/translation_report.txt that includes the name of the translation table used, the exact length of the translated protein in amino acids, and a brief biological explanation of why the standard genetic code fails for this specific sequence.

metadata.data_source: NCBI Reference Sequence: NC_012920.1 (Human mitochondrial genome, MT-CYB locus)
